pages.title: Ahmedabad: City at the Edge
pages.subtitle: India's first UNESCO World Heritage City is racing against its own growth.

pages.headline: Civic stress: High
pages.body: Dense old city core, industrial pollution, and a heat island effect converging on a city of 8.4 million.

pages.headline: Urban typology: Overnight City
pages.body: Ahmedabad expanded rapidly in one generation. Infrastructure is still catching up with the growth it triggered.

pages.headline: 48 wards. One city.
pages.body: Each ward is a constituency with a corporator accountable to its residents. Most people don't know who theirs is.

pages.text: The old city has 600-year-old streets and 2024 traffic. Nobody designed this junction.

pages.headline: Who represents your ward?
pages.body: Find your corporator, check the election timeline, and verify candidate status for all 48 AMC wards.
